Source: AgentForce API References
URL: https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/ai/agentforce/references
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Agentforce API References

## Available APIs & SDKs
- Agent API — Communication with AI agents via connected apps and token-based auth; developers create connected apps, generate tokens, and send messages leveraging topics and actions
- Agentforce Python SDK — Programmatic agent creation/management/deployment via Metadata API
- Models API — Apex classes and REST endpoints connecting to LLMs (both Apex and REST reference docs available)
- Testing API — Combines Metadata API and Connect API for building/running agent tests
- Agentforce Mobile SDK — Native iOS and Android integration for agent interactions
- Citations API — Apex classes for programmatically adding citations to agent responses

## Key Features & Tools
- Agent Script — Hybrid language combining natural language instructions with programmatic expressions for agent workflows, business rules, and conversational logic
- Agentforce DX — Pro-code tools for agent creation/testing outside Builder UI
- Lightning Types — Custom types for improving UI of custom agent actions, particularly effective for complex inputs and outputs
- Metadata & Tooling APIs — Additional access through existing Salesforce APIs

## Developer Guides Referenced
- Agentforce Developer Guide
- Agent API Developer Guide
- Models API Developer Guide
